title: More Tide Fish
description: Added some dangerous deep ocean fish to Tide⚡️
body:
This mod adds five deep ocean fish to the Tide mod.
- The first fish is the **Lantern fish**, which can be worn on the head to provide light. 
- The second fish is the **Pink Starfish** (why not name it patrick star?), which can be thrown like a dart by right-click. 
- The third fish is the **Reaver Shark**, inspired by Terraria, where the fish item is equivalent to a Diamond Pickaxe, so it is drawn in the shape of a pickaxe. 
- The fourth fish is the **Pufferfish Bomb**, which inflates when scared and, unlike ordinary pufferfish, does not retract in the third stage. Instead, it detonates like TNT, unstoppable and capable of destroying blocks underwater.
- The fifth fish is the **Electric Eel**, inspired by the whip in Terraria. When the whip hits an enemy, it will apply a debuff called conductivity.

此模组是为Tide模组添加了5条深海鱼。
- 第一条是**灯笼鱼**，它可以戴在头上提供光源。
- 第二条鱼是**粉红海星**(为什么不给他起名patrick star呢)，它可以右键像飞镖一样射出去。
- 第三条鱼是**掠夺鲨**，灵感来源于泰拉瑞亚，鱼物品相当于钻石镐。
- 第四条鱼是**炸弹河豚**，他受惊会膨胀，在第三阶段不会像普通河豚一样收回去，会在在第三阶段像tnt一样引爆无法中断且可以在水下破坏方块。
- 第五条鱼是**电鳗**，灵感来源于泰拉瑞亚的鞭子，鞭子打中敌人会施加debuff导电。
